text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm accompanying Super Creek back to her dorm
after a day out together.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, it really is kind of you to see me all the
way back.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But you don't have to walk me to the door.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I know you don't live very far from here, but
please be careful on your way home too.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much for today! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Super Creek turns away, I find myself looking
up at the sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are lots of stars out tonight. They might
look even prettier if viewed from somewhere
darker.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as I'm here, perhaps I should invite Super
Creek to go stargazing. But...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I looked back and noticed you spacing out, so I
couldn't help but feel a bit concerned...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's too late to invite her out stargazing,
after all.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...I see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I part ways with Super Creek and head to the
river.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As expected, there's not a soul in sight at this
hour. I sit down to enjoy the night sky, when...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I thought I might find you here.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I noticed your eyes twinkling as you gazed at the
sky.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I had a hunch, so I figured I'd follow it.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...You were about to invite me to join you, right?
choice_data_list: I just thought the stars looked beautiful tonight.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I knew it. You're always so restrained.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If there's ever anything you want from me, just
ask, okay?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Holding back is a big no-no!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'd be a fool to turn down an opportunity to spoil
you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek and I stargaze for a while before
heading back home.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh? Hehe, is that so?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Then let's just say that I was the one who wanted to see the stars with you tonight.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Let me stay by your side for just a little bit
longer, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... You're even cute when you're not being
upfront.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like she sees right through me. While things
are a little awkward, we spend some time
stargazing together.
